vekhol beyt yosef vaachohi uveyt avuhi lechod tafelehon ve'anehon vetoreyhon shevaqu beare'a degshen
useliqu 'imeyh af retikin af parashin vahava masherita sagia lachada
vaato 'ad beyt iderey deatad di be'ivera deyaredena usefadu taman miseped rav vetaqif lachada ve'avad laavuhi evela shave'a yomin
vachaza yatev are'a khena'anaa yat evela beveyt iderey deatad vaamaru avel taqif deyn lemitseraey 'al ken qera shemah avel mitserayim di be'ivera deyaredena
va'avadu venohi leyh ken kema di faqedinun
unetalu yateyh benohi leare'a dikhena'an uqevaru yateyh bime'arat chaqal kafeleta di zevan averaham yat chaqela leachasanat qevura min 'eferon chitaa 'al apey mamere
vetav yosef lemitserayim hu vaachohi vekhal diseliqu 'imeyh lemiqebar yat avuhi batar diqevar yat avuhi
vachazo achey yosef arey mit avuhon vaamaru dilema yitar lana devavu yosef vaatava yateyv lana yat kal bisheta di gemalena yateyh
ufaqidu levat yosef lemeymar avukh paqed qodam moteyh lemeymar
kedeyn teymerun leyosef beva'u shevoq ke'an lechova achaykh velachataehon arey visheta gemalukh ukhe'an shevoq ke'an lechova 'avedey elaha deavukh uvekha yosef bemalalutehon 'imeyh
vaazalu af achohi unefalu qodamohi vaamaru ha anachena lakh le'avedin
vaamar lehon yosef la tidachalun arey dachala dayeya ana
veatun chashavetun 'alay bisha min qodam yeya itechashevat letava bedil leme'ebad keyoma hadeyn leqayama 'am sagi
ukhe'an la tidachalun ana ezun yatekhon veyat tafelekhon venachem yatehon umalel tanechumin 'al libehon
viteyv yosef bemitserayim hu uveyt avuhi vachaya yosef mea va'asar shenin
vachaza yosef leeferayim benin telitain af beney makhir bar menashe iteyelidu verabi yosef
vaamar yosef laachohi ana mait vayya midekar dekhir yatekhon veyisaq yatekhon min are'a hada leare'a di qayim leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov
veomey yosef yat beney yiserael lemeymar midekar dekhir yeya yatekhon vetasequn yat garemay mika
umit yosef bar mea va'asar shenin vachanatu yateyh vesamuhi vearona bemitserayim
